title: lycopodium clavatum var. aristatum
intro: Lycopodium clavatum var. aristatum, also known as club moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the lycopodiophyta class. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Lycopodium clavatum var. aristatum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
